chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-1796 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) __________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 08.10.2021 None present for the petitioner Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi Deputy Attorney General Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General. ------------ This petition is prima-facie covered by pronouncement of this Court in the case of Premier Systems (Pvt.) Ltd. and others vs. Federation of Pakistan and others reported as 2018 PTD 861. In view hereof and while applying the reasons and rationale of the aforesaid judgment mutatis mutandis, this petition is disposed of in the same terms. J U D G E J U D G E Amjad/PA
